name: Partan Bree (Crab Soup)
recipeIngredient: 1/2 lb Crabmeat, Fresh, Cooked (or substitute frozen or canned)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a heavy-bottomed saucepan, bring the milk almost to a boil.
2. Add the rice and anchovy fillets. Simmer until the rice is well done.
3. Remove from heat and stir in the crabmeat.
4. Puree the soup using a blender or food processor.
5. Return the pureed soup to the saucepan and gradually stir in the chicken stock, seasoning with salt and pepper to taste.
6. Add the heavy cream just before serving.
7. This soup can be served hot or cold. It often tastes best when served hot.
